title: FY 2023-2024 - 3rd Quarter
first_page_excerpt:
STAFF RBPORT 
CITY oF OCE4N51DE 
5, 
DATE: 
June 
2024 
TO: 
Honorable Mayor and City Councilmembers 
FROM: 
Financial Services Department 
SUBJECT: FY 2023-24 THIRD QUARTER FINANCIAL STATUS REPORT 
SYNOPSIS 
Staff submits the third quarter Financial Status Report and recommends that the City 
Council accept the report and approve the budget adjustments. 
BACKGROUND 
The City Council adopted the FY 2023-24 budgets on June 7, 2023, with approved 
General Fund revenues of $204 million and expenditures of $203.3 million. The City 
adopted budget for all funds is $574.67 million in revenues and $569.93 million in 
expenditures. 
The report summarizes the preliminary General Fund major operating funds results as 
of the end of March 2024, and is not intended to be inclusive of all transactions.
